rationale: In the citing paper, Datta, Foubert, and Van Heerde (2015) appears only in a grouped citation to signal a broader stream on zero-price/free-product strategies. The text does not discuss that paper's specific findings on free-trial retention, does not use its constructs to build hypotheses, and does not reuse its methods or empirical setup. Its role is therefore background positioning rather than a distinct intellectual dependency in the argument.
